summary: Tested Pricing Page at /pricing with 3 tiers (Bronze, Silver, Gold). All backend APIs and frontend UI elements working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pricing page fully tested. All 3 tiers display correctly with proper logos, prices, and feature comparison table.

three_tier_logos_displayed.details: Bronze, Silver, Gold logos from customer-assets URLs displayed correctly

feature_comparison_table_15_features.details: All 15 features displayed: Teams & Games, Game History, PDF Box Scores, Stat Tracking Modes, Play-by-Play Logging, Public Live Stats Pages, Embed Widgets, Sponsor Banners, Season Stats & Leaderboards, CSV Export, Shared Access, Custom Branding, White-Label Embeds, Custom Team Logos, Priority Support

checkmarks_for_included_features.details: 19 green checkmarks displayed for included features

x_marks_for_excluded_features.details: 15 X marks displayed for excluded features

bronze_get_started_button.details: Button visible and clickable, navigates to /login (expected for unauthenticated users)

silver_subscribe_button.details: Button visible, enabled, and clickable. Attempts Stripe checkout (requires auth)

gold_most_popular_badge.details: MOST POPULAR badge displayed above Gold column

api_payments_packages.details: Returns correct tier data with Bronze=$0, Silver=$15, Gold=$20

api_payments_tier_features.details: Returns correct feature flags for bronze, silver, gold tiers

GET /api/payments/packages.details: Returns all subscription packages with correct pricing

GET /api/payments/tier-features/bronze.details: Returns bronze tier features (all disabled except basic)

POST /api/payments/checkout (bronze).details: Free tier returns redirect URL without Stripe checkout
